sprite.description: Sprites are tiny winged fey, usually only a few inches tall. They resemble delicate elves with insect-like wings, often serving as scouts, guardians, or tricksters. Unlike pixies, sprites are more serious and martial, often carrying tiny bows or swords and radiating an aura of judgment.
appearances: Leaf-scale armor stitched with spider silk threads
Acorn cap helmet with a feather plume
Tiny wooden shield painted with a fox’s face
Dragonfly-wing pauldrons shimmering blue
Belt of braided grass holding a thorn-sword
Breastplate made from a beetle’s carapace
Antler splinter strapped across their back like a spear
Shimmering cape woven from moth wings
Vine-wrapped greaves, still growing fresh shoots
Mask of birch bark painted with bright colors
Bracelets of twined ivy, still sprouting buds
Helm carved from a walnut shell, burnished smooth
Shoulder guard made from a curled cicada shell
Bright green tunic stitched from moss
Necklace of firefly lanterns glowing faintly
Wooden bow carved from hawthorn, humming softly
Boots of tanned leaf strips bound with sinew
Shield of layered pinecone scales
Silver thimble worn as a helmet
Braided spider silk sash trailing dramatically
Shoulder-mounted beetle shell polished bright
Armored skirt of thorned vines (carefully trimmed)
Dragonfly goggles strapped across their brow
Painted runes across wings, glowing faintly
A single hawk feather strapped like a banner

satyr.description: Satyrs are goat-legged revelers of the Feywild, known for their hedonism, music, and mischief. They are humanoid from the waist up, with shaggy furred legs, cloven hooves, and curling horns. Most wear little clothing, preferring ornaments, garlands, and instruments that reflect their carefree nature.
appearances: Wreath of wildflowers woven into their curly hair
Pan flute slung across their chest
Leather satchel jingling with bottles of wine
Necklace of bronze bells that chime with each step
Horns polished and painted with swirling designs
Fur braided with colored ribbons
Shoulder cloak of wolf hide, dramatically draped
Laurel crown of oak leaves
Gold hoop earrings jingling as they laugh
Tattooed spirals across their arms and chest
A wine-stained scarf tied around their horns
Barefoot, but anklets of bronze shells jingle as they walk
A satchel full of herbs and dried mushrooms
Bracelets carved from bone, clattering as they move
Staff topped with a vine-wrapped lantern
A pouch of dice and gaming stones hanging from belt
Hair braided into thick locks down their back
Goat fur dyed in streaks of red or green
Horns capped in bronze tips
A necklace of corks from dozens of wine bottles
Wild eyes, pupils shaped like goat slits
One horn broken and capped with silver
Skin painted in swirling festival patterns
Fur dusted with gold powder
Carrying a wineskin as if it were holy

dryad.description: Dryads are fey spirits bound to trees, appearing as beautiful humanoids with plantlike features. They embody the essence of their grove: hair like leaves or vines, skin resembling bark, and voices like the wind through branches. They rarely wear clothing, instead adorned naturally with flowers, moss, and ivy.
appearances: Hair of autumn leaves drifting slowly as if in breeze
Skin textured like smooth birch bark
Vines coiling around their arms, blooming faint flowers
Eyes glowing green like forest canopy light
Voice like rustling leaves when they speak
Crown of ivy sprouting fresh tendrils
Dress woven of moss, trailing along the ground
Bark-like markings curling across shoulders
Sap dripping faintly from one fingertip
Flowers blooming in their hair with each step
Bare feet leaving sprigs of grass behind
A hollow knot in their back where insects crawl
Skin mottled with the colors of lichen
Long fingers ending in thornlike nails
A necklace of acorns, one glowing faintly
Butterflies that never leave their presence
Eyes reflecting stars as though night sky lives within
Arms streaked with glowing lines like tree rings
Hair tangled with pine needles and twigs
Faint scent of oak sap surrounds them
Hands dripping petals when clenched
Veins glowing faintly like molten amber
A robe of fresh willow branches
Spiders crawl over them without harm
A constant faint hum of bees nearby

quickling.description: Quicklings are tiny, blue-skinned fey cursed with incredible speed. Standing no more than 1.5 feet tall, they are sharp-featured, jittery, and cruel tricksters. They move in blurs, speak too fast to follow, and delight in theft and mischief. To mortals, they seem like flashes of blue lightning darting through the woods.
appearances: Blue skin shimmering like lightning through clouds
Large pointed ears that twitch constantly
Eyes darting back and forth, glowing faintly yellow
Movements blur as if skipping frames
Voice is a rapid squeak, almost too fast to catch
A jagged knife strapped to their thigh
Hair wild and windblown as though mid-gale
Clothes torn from racing through brambles
A bandolier of shiny trinkets stolen from strangers
Fingers drum on everything with unnatural speed
Small shoes tied with strings of spider silk
Tattooed streaks across cheeks like lightning bolts
Neck twitching constantly as though scanning threats
Carrying a pouch that jingles with stolen coins
Scarf fluttering dramatically though no wind blows
Claws sharpened, nails chipped from constant use
Tongue flicks out nervously like a lizard’s
Leaves and twigs caught in their hair mid-dash
Carrying a half-eaten pastry, crumbs spraying as they run
A streak of light follows wherever they move
Whispered insults spill too fast to understand
A dagger so small it looks like a needle
Cackling laughter that echoes unnaturally quick
Always halfway between sneer and grin
Smells faintly of ozone and scorched leaves
